actionConfiguration.body:
UPDATE collections
SET status = {{appsmith.store.newStatus}}
WHERE collection_id = {{Number(appsmith.URL.queryParams.collectionId)}};

INSERT INTO job_notes (
  collection_id,
  note_text,
  note_type,
  is_system,
  created_by,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  {{Number(appsmith.URL.queryParams.collectionId)}},
  {{"Status changed from '" + qry_collection_get.data[0]?.status + "' to '" + appsmith.store.newStatus + "'"}},
  'status_change',
  true,
  {{appsmith.user.name}},
  NOW()
);
